mapper.select: select t.id as id, t.process_instance_id as processInstanceId, t.process_key as processKey, t.viewer_user_id as viewerUserId, t.viewer_username as viewerUsername, t.viewer_dept_id as viewerDeptId, t.viewer_dept_name as viewerDeptName, t.operation_type as operationType, t.process_status as processStatus, t.view_time as viewTime, t.attachment_name as attachmentName from ( select p.*, row_number() over ( partition by p.viewer_user_id, p.operation_type order by p.view_time desc ) as rn from process_view_log p ${ew.customSqlSegment} ) t where t.rn = 1 order by t.view_time desc
